---
title: "Volume I: Foundations"
---

## Introduction to Machine Learning Systems

17 decks covering the full single-machine ML stack: from data engineering and neural network computation through training, compression, hardware acceleration, and deployment. 570 slides, 141 SVG figures, approximately 19 hours of teaching material.

```{=html}
<div style="margin-bottom: 1.5rem;">
  <a href="#" class="btn-crimson">Download All Vol I PDFs</a>
  <a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/tree/main/slides/vol1" class="btn-outline">View Source</a>
</div>

<table class="slide-table">
  <thead>
    <tr>
      <th>Ch</th>
      <th>Title</th>
      <th class="num-col">Slides</th>
      <th class="num-col">Sections</th>
      <th class="num-col">SVGs</th>
      <th class="num-col">~Time</th>
      <th class="num-col">Active Learning</th>
      <th class="dl-col">PDF</th>
      <th class="dl-col">Source</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>0</td>
      <td>Course Overview</td>
      <td class="num-col">27</td>
      <td class="num-col">8</td>
      <td class="num-col">5</td>
      <td class="num-col">53 min</td>
      <td class="num-col">9</td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="#">PDF</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/tree/main/slides/vol1/00_course_overview">Source</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>1</td>
      <td>Introduction</td>
      <td class="num-col">36</td>
      <td class="num-col">9</td>
      <td class="num-col">17</td>
      <td class="num-col">74 min</td>
      <td class="num-col">9</td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="#">PDF</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/tree/main/slides/vol1/01_introduction">Source</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>2</td>
      <td>ML Systems</td>
      <td class="num-col">33</td>
      <td class="num-col">8</td>
      <td class="num-col">7</td>
      <td class="num-col">70 min</td>
      <td class="num-col">8</td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="#">PDF</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/tree/main/slides/vol1/02_ml_systems">Source</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>3</td>
      <td>ML Workflow</td>
      <td class="num-col">36</td>
      <td class="num-col">10</td>
      <td class="num-col">8</td>
      <td class="num-col">79 min</td>
      <td class="num-col">8</td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="#">PDF</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/tree/main/slides/vol1/03_ml_workflow">Source</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>4</td>
      <td>Data Engineering</td>
      <td class="num-col">31</td>
      <td class="num-col">9</td>
      <td class="num-col">8</td>
      <td class="num-col">66 min</td>
      <td class="num-col">9</td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="#">PDF</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/tree/main/slides/vol1/04_data_engineering">Source</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>5</td>
      <td>Neural Network Computation</td>
      <td class="num-col">33</td>
      <td class="num-col">8</td>
      <td class="num-col">7</td>
      <td class="num-col">68 min</td>
      <td class="num-col">9</td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="#">PDF</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/tree/main/slides/vol1/05_nn_computation">Source</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>6</td>
      <td>Network Architectures</td>
      <td class="num-col">30</td>
      <td class="num-col">7</td>
      <td class="num-col">7</td>
      <td class="num-col">63 min</td>
      <td class="num-col">9</td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="#">PDF</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/tree/main/slides/vol1/06_nn_architectures">Source</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>7</td>
      <td>ML Frameworks</td>
      <td class="num-col">34</td>
      <td class="num-col">8</td>
      <td class="num-col">7</td>
      <td class="num-col">73 min</td>
      <td class="num-col">8</td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="#">PDF</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/tree/main/slides/vol1/07_frameworks">Source</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>8</td>
      <td>Model Training</td>
      <td class="num-col">34</td>
      <td class="num-col">8</td>
      <td class="num-col">7</td>
      <td class="num-col">68 min</td>
      <td class="num-col">8</td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="#">PDF</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/tree/main/slides/vol1/08_training">Source</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>9</td>
      <td>Data Selection</td>
      <td class="num-col">30</td>
      <td class="num-col">8</td>
      <td class="num-col">7</td>
      <td class="num-col">63 min</td>
      <td class="num-col">8</td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="#">PDF</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/tree/main/slides/vol1/09_data_selection">Source</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>10</td>
      <td>Model Compression</td>
      <td class="num-col">30</td>
      <td class="num-col">8</td>
      <td class="num-col">9</td>
      <td class="num-col">64 min</td>
      <td class="num-col">8</td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="#">PDF</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/tree/main/slides/vol1/10_model_compression">Source</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>11</td>
      <td>Hardware Acceleration</td>
      <td class="num-col">31</td>
      <td class="num-col">9</td>
      <td class="num-col">7</td>
      <td class="num-col">66 min</td>
      <td class="num-col">9</td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="#">PDF</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/tree/main/slides/vol1/11_hw_acceleration">Source</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>12</td>
      <td>Benchmarking</td>
      <td class="num-col">32</td>
      <td class="num-col">10</td>
      <td class="num-col">9</td>
      <td class="num-col">68 min</td>
      <td class="num-col">8</td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="#">PDF</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/tree/main/slides/vol1/12_benchmarking">Source</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>13</td>
      <td>Model Serving</td>
      <td class="num-col">35</td>
      <td class="num-col">9</td>
      <td class="num-col">7</td>
      <td class="num-col">74 min</td>
      <td class="num-col">10</td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="#">PDF</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/tree/main/slides/vol1/13_model_serving">Source</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>14</td>
      <td>ML Operations</td>
      <td class="num-col">33</td>
      <td class="num-col">9</td>
      <td class="num-col">6</td>
      <td class="num-col">69 min</td>
      <td class="num-col">9</td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="#">PDF</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/tree/main/slides/vol1/14_ml_ops">Source</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>15</td>
      <td>Responsible Engineering</td>
      <td class="num-col">30</td>
      <td class="num-col">6</td>
      <td class="num-col">5</td>
      <td class="num-col">61 min</td>
      <td class="num-col">8</td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="#">PDF</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/tree/main/slides/vol1/15_responsible_engr">Source</a></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>16</td>
      <td>Conclusion</td>
      <td class="num-col">25</td>
      <td class="num-col">7</td>
      <td class="num-col">5</td>
      <td class="num-col">51 min</td>
      <td class="num-col">8</td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="#">PDF</a></td>
      <td class="dl-col"><a href="https://github.com/harvard-edge/cs249r_book/tree/main/slides/vol1/16_conclusion">Source</a></td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
  <tfoot>
    <tr style="font-weight: 600; border-top: 2px solid #A51C30;">
      <td></td>
      <td>Total</td>
      <td class="num-col">570</td>
      <td class="num-col">141</td>
      <td class="num-col">141</td>
      <td class="num-col">~19 hrs</td>
      <td class="num-col">145</td>
      <td class="dl-col"></td>
      <td class="dl-col"></td>
    </tr>
  </tfoot>
</table>
```

::: {.callout-note}
PDF download links are placeholders. The compiled PDFs will be available once CI builds are configured.
:::
